title: Executive Order 9200—Amending Subdivision II of Schedule A of the Civil Service Rules
text:
By virtue of the authority vested in me by section 2 of the Civil Service Act (22 Stat. 404), paragraph 3, Subdivision II of Schedule A of the Civil Service Rules is hereby amended to read as follows:
3. Chief and Assistant Chief of the Foreign Service Buildings Office and Chief of the Office of Foreign Service Furnishings.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
July 16, 1942.
